language-course.label: General View

language-course.label: Problems

compare: Compared to a homogeneous group of similar ability, a mixed-ability class forces teachers to pitch lessons at an average level that suits no-one perfectly.

contrast: However, mixed-ability classes also offer benefits, as stronger students can support weaker ones.

language-course.label: Recommendations
language-course.anchor: One key recommendation would be to conduct a clear placement test before the course begins.
